summary: Iteration 10 testing completed successfully. All features verified: ROI Calculator moved from homepage to /services/real-estate page with 4 cities (Rome, Lima, Valencia, Munich) and EUR currency. VideoTestimonials 'Read All Reviews' button with badge showing 20 links to /about. Backend regression tests all passed.

Homepage: VideoTestimonials section renders correctly
Homepage: 'Read All Reviews' button present with badge showing 20
Homepage: 'Read All Reviews' button links to /about
Homepage: Clicking 'Read All Reviews' navigates to /about page
Real Estate page /services/real-estate: ROI Calculator section renders

Real Estate page: City button 'lima' (Lima, Peru) present
Real Estate page: City button 'valencia' (Valencia, Spain) present
Real Estate page: City button 'monaco' (Munich, Germany) present

Project Management page: ROI Calculator NOT present (as expected)
Digital Marketing page: ROI Calculator NOT present (as expected)
Blog post page: BlogReactions component renders with 4 reaction buttons
Backend: POST /api/contact returns 200 with ok:true
